sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 67 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.656/2026 2. For hearing of main case 02.04.2026 Mr. Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the applicant Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for respondent It is jointly submitted that the impugned judgment may be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. It is also stated that pending adjudication as aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the applicant. The reference application is disposed of in terms as above. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
